overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm at night on a highway. The windshield is covered with snowflakes, and headlights illuminate the snow-covered road ahead. This is gameplay footage from a truck simulator game featuring realistic snow physics and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered highway with overhead directional signs

events.description: red vehicle overtakes the truck on the left side
truck navigates a gentle curve to the right on the snowy road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy snowfall on the highway, navigating gentle curves while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: red car overtaking the truck on the left side in the passing lane

entered.detail: metal gantry structure spanning the highway with support pillars
blue directional signs with white text and symbols mounted on the overhead gantry
highway road surface covered in snow with visible white lane markings
interior dashboard with illuminated gauges, speedometer, and GPS navigation screen
snow-laden evergreen trees lining the left side of the highway
snow-laden evergreen trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through heavy snowfall at night, passing under overhead blue highway signs. The windshield is covered with snowflakes, and headlights illuminate the snow-covered road ahead. A red vehicle overtakes on the left as the truck navigates gentle curves through the winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway section through forested area with guardrails

events.description: white car visible ahead in the distance through the falling snow
rest area sign becomes visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing through the snowstorm, navigating winding curves while approaching other traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead in the same lane, visible through the heavy snowfall

entered.detail: metal guardrail on the right side of the road with reflective markers
highway sign indicating upcoming rest area with parking symbol

segments.scene_description: The truck continues along a winding highway section lined with snow-covered trees and guardrails on both sides. Other vehicles are visible ahead through the heavy snow. A rest area sign appears on the right as the truck approaches an exit ramp, with the snowstorm intensifying.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing rest area exit with dense forest

events.description: passing the rest area exit ramp on the right side
truck navigates a slight curve while maintaining speed through deep snow

agents.ego_description: driving past the rest area entrance, continuing through heavy snowstorm with reduced visibility and no other traffic nearby

entered.detail: blue parking sign with white P symbol indicating rest area parking entrance
exit ramp leading to rest area parking lot, partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The truck passes the rest area exit marked by a blue parking sign, continuing through the intensifying snowstorm. The surrounding forest becomes denser with heavy snow accumulation on the trees. Visibility remains very low as the truck maintains course on the snow-covered highway, leaving the rest area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin navigating a heavy nighttime snowstorm that grows increasingly intense as the road winds deeper into a frozen forest. It begins on a highway under blue overhead signs, where headlights cut through the falling snow and a red vehicle overtakes the truck on the left. As the road curves, the scene shifts to a winding section lined with snow-covered trees and guardrails, with other vehicles appearing as dim shapes through the thickening flurry. The camera then passes a rest area exit marked by a blue parking sign, moving beyond the ramp as the storm intensifies. Finally, the environment closes in as the surrounding forest becomes denser and snow accumulation on the trees increases, leaving visibility severely limited on the white-covered highway.
